CE1.justification: Acted directly — polished, corrected, and appended without asking the user to recall or restate anything, only offering an optional revert if they push back.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but the closing conditional about 'if the original framing was deliberate' plus the trailing pointer to the in-file note stretches into slightly more prose than the task strictly needed.

CE3.justification: Stated where (appended to decisions.md as accepted, original draft preserved in tmp/) and why (provenance marked 'mixed' because content was materially revised) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Each action committed cleanly — draft preserved, single append to decisions.md with provenance and revision note — so an interrupt would leave no orphans.
